debug_mode.description: Enable verbose debug logging for the BizDevVibes plugin (live mode when off)

game_display_name.description: Public display name of the game. Config-driven so a rename stays a config change, not a refactor.

turn_timeout_seconds.description: How long a seat has to act before the turn auto-takes the FREE sum (the 'fate default').

negotiation_window_seconds.description: How long opponents may offer a bribe-to-fate before the mover must choose. 0 disables negotiation.

agent_max_tokens_per_match.description: Per-match LLM token ceiling for an agent seat. Crossing it degrades the seat to the deterministic baseline agent.

agent_max_repair_retries.description: How many times an illegal LLM move is sent back for repair before the seat degrades to the baseline agent.

min_seats.description: Smallest table the lobby offers. Note the fee-to-opponents mechanic is near-meaningless at 2 seats.

max_seats.description: Largest table the lobby offers (the engine supports up to 6).

default_seats.description: Default seat count for a new match. 3 is the smallest table where the redistribution mechanic is real.
